content: Self-Refine’s single-perspective iterative refinement framework can be enhanced by integrating the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives central to recent LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid approach that retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of no extra training or supervision while fixing its limitation of repeating blind spots from a fixed initial model perspective. This hybrid framework can outperform both single-perspective Self-Refine and complex multi-perspective reflection methods that require additional fine-tuning.
